upwork_ai_jobs.local_summary: Public page showed a live AI jobs count, recent AI-agent/automation job examples, and a visible median AI engineer hourly range of USD 35-60.
upwork_ai_jobs.gate_note: Live job application, profile, proposal, messaging, payment, and account activity are gated.

arc_prize_2026.local_summary: ARC Prize 2026 page states USD 2M in prizes across 3 tracks, dates through December 2026, open-source/reproducibility expectations, and no internet access during Kaggle evaluation.
arc_prize_2026.gate_note: Official submission, Kaggle account work, team/IP/license commitments, and compute spend are gated.

kaggle_money_directory.local_summary: Kaggle money competition directory is the route source, but the rendered page was dynamic in this readback; local scout must require a later rules/account check before competition selection.
kaggle_money_directory.gate_note: Competition join, submission, account profile, team joining, and prize eligibility actions are gated.

kalshi_public_market_data.local_summary: Kalshi docs describe unauthenticated public market-data endpoints for series, events, markets, and orderbooks; authenticated endpoints cover trading and portfolio work.
kalshi_public_market_data.gate_note: Authentication, trading, portfolio, deposits, withdrawals, and real-money actions are gated.

wave23_refresh.local_summary: Wave 23 refreshed 18 online money paths and recommended converting them into lane manager scout packets.
wave23_refresh.gate_note: Wave 23 recorded zero side effects and set local-only constraints.

routes.source_signal: AI freelance demand, recent AI-agent/automation postings, visible AI engineer hourly range.
routes.first_local_proof: Build an offer matrix mapping lab capabilities to 5 no-contact Upwork AI job archetypes.
acceptance_checks: Five archetypes are sourced from public job text or category summaries.
Every offer avoids claims of guaranteed client results.
No Upwork account, proposal, message, or profile action is performed.

next_action: Have lane managers execute the highest-priority local proof tasks one at a time, starting with Upwork AI offer matrix, PromptBase approval rubric, Algora claim-readiness checklist, and ARC baseline packet.
